reviews.review_title: I found this game and it’s great!
reviews.review_description:
This game is the perfect mix of scary but fun and I can’t believe it. It’s terrifying and I almost pooed myself but it’s still great. I honestly reccomend it because the community is great and I see tons of players!

No this is not a fake review this is 100% genuine and I love this game so much 5 stars off the bat!
This game is very good there is alot of cosmetics and cool maps the game is still in development rn so theres gonna be more soon!!
